title: Excalibur | Tooltips & Cursor
description: Excalibur support for the mods "Legendary Tooltips" & "Minecraft Cursor".
body:
# Excalibur Tooltips & Cursor
This is an unofficial [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack for the mods [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) and [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor). All textures have been edited to best fit within the Excalibur style.

This does come with some included configs (highly recommended) to drag and drop into the configs folder. The configs are from Legendary Tooltips 1.4.5 and Minecraft Cursor 3.10.0. You may want add the change configs manually if you are using different versions. Configs are located in the "configs to add" folder, just extract the pack to access them.

## Credits
- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - Excalibur Author
- [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend) - Legendary Tooltips Author
- [fishstiz](https://modrinth.com/user/fishstiz) - Minecraft Cursor Author
